textByHash.540957edf88ed717d20605d33d9c53998d1449bd: I was drawn here... I use to be a traveling doctor, until I arrived in Al Kharid.
textByHash.3cb86b8784dbe492db82c03daa70fef763be5565: Then I heard it call to me... I immediately gave up my profession and set up here.
textByHash.92b737c3fe82daf3e52aaf6245c2691ef757c124: I'm happy here... the voices tell me I'm happy here. I can continue my work.
textByHash.2165f89ad6019ccc42ba75abfc54d1ea818d808e: Of course there isn't, the hole you idiot, the hole speaks to me and I listen... It says I will do great things, only if I listen...
textByHash.fe4db0d3d4cbbfb59dc729d58479207c446267e1: Hello. What brings you to my surgery today?
textByHash.5bd11067c36b688d56ec118b0755c15c297cd1e3: Okay, this will hurt you more than it will me.
textByHash.dbd585da57e051f0f66e51d2f5b9ffad12fe36e8: Oh, I used to be a travelling surgeon. Whenever I saw someone have an accident, I'd be there to check for concussion and offer treatment.
textByHash.c87504fee2a3e78f2f36cb45feeb510aa35527a4: It was a worthy cause, but I didn't feel properly appreciated, so I retired. Then I got bored, so I came to work here.
textByHash.d4f9ae006b24f154222dad2daf3e2221eaa330cd: So can I help you with something?
